# netbox_tag (Resource)

Manages a NetBox tag.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a tag
resource "netbox_tag" "example" {
  name        = "production"
  slug        = "production"
  color       = "ff5733"
  description = "Production environment resources"
}

# Tag with hex color including #
resource "netbox_tag" "dev" {
  name  = "development"
  slug  = "development"
  color = "#0099cc"
}

# Use existing tag with upsert - will find by slug and update if exists
resource "netbox_tag" "reusable" {
  name        = "infrastructure"
  slug        = "infrastructure"
  color       = "9e9e9e"
  description = "Infrastructure resources"
  upsert      = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the tag.

### Optional

- `color` (String) Color for the tag in hex format (e.g., '9e9e9e').
- `description` (String) Description of the tag.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly slug for the tag. Auto-generated from name if not provided.
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing tag with matching slug instead of creating a new one.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.
